name: Rationale-driven multilingual overlays

examQuestions.description: Use only ExamQuestion rows whose English teaching fields are upgraded (strong rationale package) before translation.
examQuestions.referenceImplementation: server/content-integrity-scanner.ts getNonCATQuestionsNeedingRationaleUpgrade (inverse filter = upgraded set), countNonCATRationaleAudit
excludeByDefault: adaptive_eligible CAT pool items if product policy reserves them from overlay import
image-only stems until exhibit alt-text + rationale are stable

pathwayLessons.description: For lesson preTest/postTest, translate display strings from catalog English only after rationales in JSON are upgraded (no empty or placeholder rationale lines).

nextTopicsSelected.why: Wave 1 translated lesson bodies but English pre/post on most lessons; upgraded English rationales in checks unlock full localized review.
nextTopicsSelected.sharedCoreScopedOverlay: scoped per pathwayId:slug; Canada vs US wording where units/scope differ

nextTopicsSelected.why: Largest NCLEX client-needs weight; rationales must teach why wrong options are unsafe or out-of-scope.
nextTopicsSelected.sharedCoreScopedOverlay: shared clinical core; RPN/LPN vs RN scope overlays for lower tiers

nextTopicsSelected.why: High-stakes time-sensitive content; upgraded rationales translate well to fr/es/tl clinical teaching.
Very high exam frequency; complements Wave 1 COPD/ARDS.
Heavy reasoning content; distractor teaching in upgraded English is the main learner value.
nextTopicsSelected.sharedCoreScopedOverlay: yes; unit labels (SI) emphasized for Canada

nextTopicsSelected.cluster: Anticoagulants, opioids, insulin (beyond Wave 1 lesson), antibiotics
nextTopicsSelected.why: Pharmacological therapies domain; harm reduction narratives must survive translation.

nextTopicsSelected.cluster: AKI, dialysis access, UTI vs pyelo, GI bleed, pancreatitis
nextTopicsSelected.why: Cross-topic prioritization; strong rationales reduce memorization-only studying.

nextTopicsSelected.cluster: Stroke window, ICP, seizure precautions; DKA/HHS, SIADH vs DI
nextTopicsSelected.why: Time windows and discriminator questions need precise translated teaching.
Safety and infection control domain; procedure language must be accurate in every locale.
nextTopicsSelected.sharedCoreScopedOverlay: yes; institution/policy nuance may need CA vs US

nextTopicsSelected.cluster: Preeclampsia, PPH; peds fever/RSV; suicide risk, psychotropics
nextTopicsSelected.why: High learner confusion + scope differences; only import after English rationale upgrades are clinician-reviewed.
nextTopicsSelected.sharedCoreScopedOverlay: scoped-heavy (RPN/LPN vs RN when items exist per tier)

recommendedBuildOrder: 1. Export UUID lists: upgraded ExamQuestion ids per topic/tag/tier (exclude non-upgraded rows).

2. Author fr/es/tl EXAM_QUESTION payloads (stem, options display labels, rationale, correctAnswerExplanation, distractorRationales, clinicalPearl, optional teaching fields) from English source strings.
3. Author PATHWAY_LESSON overlays for remaining Wave 1 pre/post + high-traffic lesson slugs (preTest/postTest question/options/rationale only; never correct indices).
4. Merge per locale into wave3-{locale}.manifest.json (version 1, items[]).
5. Dry-run: npm run i18n:import:content -- --file tools/i18n/content-import/wave3/wave3-fr.manifest.json --dry-run (repeat es, tl).
6. Apply imports; rerun dry-run to confirm idempotent unchanged counts.

fr.notes: Canadian French nursing register for rationales; protect NCLEX, REx-PN, RN, PN, NP, FNP, NurseNest.

es.notes: Neutral clinical Spanish; keep drug names where standard.

tl.notes: Natural Tagalog + English clinical terms where clearer; same protected tokens.

sourceQualityBlockers: ExamQuestion rows missing the full upgraded rationale package cannot be translated until English remediation completes (avoid translating thin or placeholder teaching).
Stable ExamQuestion.id must exist in target database — IDs are not in git; export required per environment.
Overlay options[] length must match canonical ExamQuestion.options count or import validation fails.
SATA / NGN / ordered items need per-format payload discipline; validate on dry-run.
CAT / adaptive-eligible items: confirm product policy before overlaying (may be excluded from learner review merge).
RPN/LPN and NP tiers: English rationales must be scope-reviewed before translation to avoid embedding RN-only reasoning in PN overlays.
Flashcards remain out of Wave 3 unless deck/card IDs are pinned (same as Wave 1).

estimatedScopeNotes.examQuestionOverlays: Primary volume driver — prioritize by topic tags tied to upgraded bank rows.
estimatedScopeNotes.pathwayLessonOverlays: Secondary — closes Wave 1 gap (localized lesson checks with strong translated rationales).
